/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesnavgraph.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnavgraph.so CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/yaml_navgraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/navgraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/timed_reservation_list_node_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/constraint_repo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/polygon_node_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/static_list_edge_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/timed_reservation_list_edge_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/static_list_edge_cost_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/edge_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/polygon_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/polygon_edge_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/node_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/edge_cost_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/constraints/static_list_node_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/navgraph_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/search_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/navgraph_path.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph.dir/navgraph_edge.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -L/usr/lib64 -lyaml-cpp -ltolua++ -lm -lstdc++ -lm /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -L/usr/lib64 -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
